title: neriandra suberecta
intro: Neriandra suberecta, also known as the Philippine or Indian coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Native to tropical Asia, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to have potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Neriandra suberecta include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Neriandra suberecta are typically made from the plant's leaves, roots, or bark, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
